title: Sanitizers, Static Analysis, and Fuzzing · Memory Trace: Coverage Guided Fuzzing
summary: A security parser needs fast local feedback, nightly deep instrumentation, adversarial generation, and reproducible findings. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem coverage guided fuzzing increment in layered memory-defect test matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build a deterministic libFuzzer target with bounded input, sanitizer instrumentation, corpus, dictionary, timeout, and minimized regressions.
Run Clang and GCC static analyzers, preserve paths and assumptions, classify findings, and regression-test repairs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
